response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match this role's core requirements. His professional C++ experience is limited to a six-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; his career since has centered on TypeScript/Node.js web platforms and DLang. There is no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443 / SDL security practice, MQTT/IoT work, or the industrial protocols listed as advantageous. His low-latency DLang systems work shows transferable performance and concurrency skills, but the gap on modern hands-on C++ and industrial cybersecurity is too large for a senior C++-focused position.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testable design
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, dojos)
concerns: Minimal and outdated professional C++ experience (~6 months, ended 2015)
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or MQTT/IoT protocol exposure
Recent career trajectory is full-stack web/TypeScript, diverging from the role's systems focus

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or IEC 62443 background
